rationale: Section 11.185 governs exemptions for charitable organizations developing colonia model subdivisions on unimproved real property. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b) and contains no cross-reference or dependency on that provision.
_note: No conflict; §11.185 addresses a distinct exemption category with no linkage to the residence homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b).
